chosen_action.title: Stop re-surfacing already-delivered manual outreach assets as fresh do-now work

why_this_action.summary: The latest execution board had already recorded the ctxt.dev / Signum packet as delivered to the current chat in this review window, but the selector/runtime helpers could still treat the underlying asset file as waiting for execution. That mismatch could push the loop back into fake-progress manual follow-through instead of the next truthful repair or lane.
shared_findings_used: marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now packet remains after the manual asset delivery
distribution_lane_latest.json: lane still pointed at manual_outreach_asset_follow_through after delivery
marketing_2026-05-25_manual_outreach_asset_follow_through_delivery.json: ctxt.dev / Signum packet was already delivered to the current chat
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: same-family overlap is already paused and Codeberg remains flat
distribution_lane_latest.md: current lane reasoning still referenced the already-used manual asset

result.summary: Patched both selector and executor manual-asset discovery so a delivered-to-current-chat packet stays out of the waiting-execution pool until its review window expires, then added regression coverage on both sides.
